output:
Aggregated execute batches: completed 8/8.
Batch 1: Batch 1 complete. T1 and T13 are implemented, targeted Vitest coverage passed, and a checkpoint was written to `.megaplan/plans/implement-two-tier-shot-20260406-1054/execution_batch_1.json`.
Batch 2: Batch 2 complete. `rowsToConfig()` now carries `pinnedShotGroups`, `materializeData()` forwards `current.config.pinnedShotGroups`, the direct round-trip test caller was updated to assert persistence, and `buildDataFromCurrentRegistry()` was verified unchanged as already flowing through `repairConfig -> migrateToFlatTracks -> assembleTimelineData`. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/implement-two-tier-shot-20260406-1054/execution_batch_2.json`.
Batch 3: Batch 3 complete. `useTimelineCommit` now supports `type:'pinnedShotGroups'`, the `rows` mutation accepts `pinnedShotGroupsOverride` and rebuilds from the overridden config so `stableSignature` is recomputed from the final config, and the existing `config` mutation path now preserves `customEffects` and `pinnedShotGroups` during reserialization. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/implement-two-tier-shot-20260406-1054/execution_batch_3.json`.
Batch 4: Batch 4 complete. Added pinned-shot-group serialize validation, introduced the `usePinnedShotGroups` mutation hook, reconciled pinned groups inline during `materializeData()`, and implemented atomic shot-drop creation with a single `rows` edit plus `pinnedShotGroupsOverride`. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/implement-two-tier-shot-20260406-1054/execution_batch_4.json`.
Batch 5: Batch 5 complete. Pinned shot groups now participate in `useShotGroups` inference suppression, final-video switching snapshots/restores image clips through single `rows` edits with `pinnedShotGroupsOverride`, and pinned image groups auto-sync against shot image changes through a debounced `usePinnedGroupSync` hook. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/implement-two-tier-shot-20260406-1054/execution_batch_5.json`.
Batch 6: Batch 6 complete. Visual distinction for suggested vs pinned shot groups is implemented in `TimelineCanvas`, grouped drag expansion is deferred until the drag threshold, and pinned group `trackId` now stays in sync across rows, config/new-track, and `moveClipToRow()` move paths. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/implement-two-tier-shot-20260406-1054/execution_batch_6.json`.
Batch 7: Batch 7 complete. `useShotGroups` now has the 4 required pinned-group suppression/merge tests on top of the original 8 passing cases, and the shot-group context menu now supports pin, unpin, switch-to-video, and switch-to-images with the required guards and callback wiring. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/implement-two-tier-shot-20260406-1054/execution_batch_7.json`.
Batch 8: Batch 8 complete. Full `src/tools/video-editor/` validation passed, `npm run build` succeeded in this batch, `rowsToConfig()` still has only the expected callers, and the AI timeline-agent load path still relies on the permissive `TimelineConfig` cast through `normalizeTimelineRow()`. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/implement-two-tier-shot-20260406-1054/execution_batch_8.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Defined `PinnedShotGroup` and snapshot types on `TimelineConfig`, allowed `pinnedShotGroups` in serialization validation/output, and preserved cloned pinned groups in both `migrateToFlatTracks()` return paths. Verified with `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/serialize.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/lib/timeline-save-utils.test.ts`.

Added the shared `shot` drag type and MIME helpers, plus native shot-card drag start wiring in `SortableShotItem` that emits shot id/name/non-video image generation ids and reuses the existing drag preview. Verified with `npx vitest run src/shared/lib/__tests__/dragDrop.test.ts` and source checks on the shot drag wiring.

Threaded `pinnedShotGroups` through `rowsToConfig()` and `materializeData()`, updated the direct round-trip caller in `render-bounds.validation.test.ts` to assert pinned-group persistence, and verified `buildDataFromCurrentRegistry()` already preserves the required `repairConfig -> migrateToFlatTracks -> assembleTimelineData` path without further edits. Verified all `rowsToConfig()` callers with grep and ran the affected Vitest modules.

Added the new `type: 'pinnedShotGroups'` mutation, added `pinnedShotGroupsOverride` on `type: 'rows'`, and rebuilt from config in the rows override path so `stableSignature` is recomputed from the final config instead of mutating assembled data in place. Also updated the existing `type: 'config'` branch to preserve current `customEffects` and `pinnedShotGroups` during reserialization. Verified with the surrounding hook and save-utils suites.

Added a serialize round-trip test covering `pinnedShotGroups`, reran the full `useShotGroups` module, and verified the batch with `npm run build`. The requested validation suite passed: `serialize.test.ts`, `useShotGroups.test.ts`, the added batch verification modules, and a successful production build.

Created `usePinnedShotGroups` with `pinGroup`, `unpinGroup`, and `updatePinnedGroup`, each reading current pinned groups from config and committing through `applyEdit({ type: 'pinnedShotGroups', pinnedShotGroups })`. Source verification confirms the hook only reads `dataRef.current` and performs all writes through `applyEdit`.

Moved pinned-group reconciliation into `materializeData()` so stale clip pruning and deleted-video snapshot restoration happen before commit assembly. Added hook-level tests that cover pinned image deletion and deleted-video restoration; the deletion test records exactly one `beforeCommit` emission, verifying the reconcile path stays inside a single commit boundary.

Implemented shot-drop handling in `useExternalDrop` by resolving shot images from `ShotsContext`, registering each image asset, building clip mutations through extracted asset-drop helpers, and committing the result as one `type:'rows'` edit with `pinnedShotGroupsOverride`. The external-drop test verifies a single atomic edit and confirms `handleAssetDrop` is not called for shot payloads.

Updated `useShotGroups` to surface pinned groups, suppress inferred groups via clip-id subset matching, and preserve prior behavior when `pinnedShotGroups` is undefined. Verified with the full `useShotGroups` test module, the surrounding hook suite, and a successful build.

Refactored `useSwitchToFinalVideo` to auto-pin image groups, snapshot image clip metadata before swap, switch back from stored snapshots, and commit both directions as single `rows` edits with `pinnedShotGroupsOverride`. Verified with dedicated hook tests, source checks, and a successful build.

Added debounced pinned-group image sync in `usePinnedShotGroups`, wired it into `TimelineEditor`, and constrained sync to image-mode groups with all edits routed through `applyEdit({ type:'rows', pinnedShotGroupsOverride })`. Verified with hook tests covering debounce and video-mode guard, plus the full batch validation modules and build.

Verified `TimelineCanvas` now carries `isPinned` into positioned shot groups, renders suggested groups with dashed lighter overlays, keeps pinned groups solid with the stronger existing color-mix treatment, and keeps pinned shot labels visible without hover. Validation passed in the full `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` module and the production build.

Verified pinned-group drag expansion happens only after the drag threshold is crossed, and pinned group `trackId` stays synchronized in the same edit across grouped rows moves, grouped config/new-track moves, and `moveClipToRow()` track moves. Validation passed in the full drag, track-management, and multi-drag test modules plus the production build.

Verified all 8 existing `useShotGroups` tests still pass, added the 4 required suppression and merge cases for pinned groups, and confirmed the production build still succeeds. Validation passed in the full `useShotGroups.test.ts` module, the surrounding timeline editor modules, and the production build.
commands_run: rg -n "suppresses an inferred group|does not suppress a different cluster|returns pinned groups with isPinned true|merges pinned and inferred groups together" src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts

task_updates.executor_notes: Verified the shot-group context menu now carries pinned state, track id, and mode through the canvas/editor wiring; shows pin, unpin, switch-to-video, and switch-to-images actions under the required guards; and preserves the existing switch-to-final-video callback shape. Validation passed in the full `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` and `TimelineEditor.test.ts` modules plus the production build.
commands_run: rg -n "Pin as Shot Group|Unpin|Switch to Final Video|Switch to Images|trackId|isPinned|mode === 'video'" src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ShotGroupContextMenu.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx

task_updates.executor_notes: Verified the full `src/tools/video-editor/` suite passes, including the original and new `useShotGroups` coverage, the serialize round-trip coverage, and `render-bounds.validation.test.ts`. Confirmed `npm run build` succeeds in this batch. Also verified `rowsToConfig()` still has only the expected callers and confirmed the AI timeline-agent load path still relies on the permissive `TimelineConfig` cast via `normalizeTimelineRow()`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `pinnedShotGroups` is included in `ALLOWED_TOP_LEVEL_KEYS`, and both `migrateToFlatTracks()` return paths now preserve it through `clonePinnedShotGroups()`.
Confirmed `getDragType()` detects the new shot MIME type, and `SortableShotItem` now sets `draggable` with `onDragStart={handleShotDragStart}` calling `setShotDragData()`.

Confirmed `rowsToConfig()` now accepts optional `pinnedShotGroups`, `materializeData()` passes `current.config.pinnedShotGroups`, and grep shows the only direct callers (`useTimelineCommit.ts` and `render-bounds.validation.test.ts`) were updated.

Confirmed the rows override path applies `pinnedShotGroupsOverride` to `baseNextData.config` and then rebuilds via `buildDataFromCurrentRegistry(...)`; it does not mutate an already-assembled `TimelineData`, so `stableSignature` is recomputed from the final config.
Confirmed all 8 existing `useShotGroups` tests pass unchanged, and the new serialize round-trip test with `pinnedShotGroups` passes in `serialize.test.ts`.

Confirmed `usePinnedShotGroups` only reads `dataRef.current.config.pinnedShotGroups` and all mutations route through `applyEdit({ type: 'pinnedShotGroups', pinnedShotGroups })`; there is no direct mutation of `dataRef.current`.

Confirmed reconciliation is inline in `materializeData()` with no follow-up `applyEdit`, and the new hook-level deletion test records exactly one `beforeCommit` emission for a pinned-clip deletion while the deleted-video test restores the image snapshot in the same commit.
Confirmed shot drop uses one `applyEdit({ type: 'rows', ... pinnedShotGroupsOverride })` call, and the external-drop test verifies `handleAssetDrop` is not called for shot payloads.

Confirmed inferred-group suppression uses clip-id subset matching against pinned groups, and the full `useShotGroups` test module still passes with `pinnedShotGroups` omitted, preserving prior behavior.

Confirmed `switchToFinalVideo` snapshots image clip metadata before removing clips, `switchToImages` restores from the stored snapshot, and both paths commit as single `applyEdit({ type: 'rows', pinnedShotGroupsOverride })` edits.

Confirmed auto-sync is limited to `mode === 'images'`, debounced with `window.setTimeout`, and writes through a single `applyEdit` rows mutation with `pinnedShotGroupsOverride` rather than mutating timeline state directly.

Confirmed suggested groups render with dashed borders and lighter `color-mix` overlays, pinned groups remain solid with the stronger existing `color-mix` treatment, and pinned shot names stay visible without hover in `TimelineCanvas`.

Confirmed pinned-group expansion is deferred until the first pointer move past the drag threshold, and pinned group `trackId` is updated in the same edit across all required move paths: rows multi-drag, config/new-track multi-drag, and `moveClipToRow()`.
Confirmed all 8 original `useShotGroups` tests still pass, the 4 new suppression and merge tests pass in the same module, and `npm run build` succeeds.

Confirmed `Switch to Final Video` only appears when `finalVideoMap.get(shotId)` is present and the group is not already in video mode, `Switch to Images` only appears when `mode === 'video'`, and the existing `onSwitchToFinalVideo({ shotId, clipIds, rowId })` callback shape is preserved.

Confirmed `npm run build` passes with no type errors, the full `src/tools/video-editor/` Vitest suite passes, and the AI timeline-agent path still passes config through `normalizeTimelineRow()` where `row.config` is permissively cast as `TimelineConfig`.
